anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown binds receipt authoring to std_microcosm_receipt, the receipt doctrine kind, and proof diagnostic evidence because receipts must capture replayable evidence, omissions, and claim ceilings rather than launder status into support.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown binds receipt authoring to std_microcosm_receipt, the receipt doctrine kind, and proof diagnostic evidence because receipts must capture replayable evidence, omissions, and claim ceilings rather than launder status into support.

title: Microcosm Receipt Author
triggers: A claim, validator result, projection refresh, source import, or scoped landing needs a durable receipt with command or validator id, result, evidence refs, omissions, anti-claims, and authority ceiling.
The agent can name the source refs, fixture or input ids, output artifact refs, public/private boundary, omitted bodies, and replay command from source evidence.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_receipt, the producing validator or command, referenced standards, evidence artifacts, omission boundary, generated health, and existing receipts before editing.
Admit only replayable or source-coupled receipt rows; do not infer receipt authority from a badge, screenshot, prose status, or projection count.
Regenerate the skill corpus and doctrine lattice, then run receipt-adjacent corpus checks, focused tests, and broad projection checks before scoped commit.
